item.title: Syllabus
item.description: Course Syllabus Outline the course description, learning objectives, required materials, grading breakdown, and major deadlines. Keep this page focused on the big picture of what learners will accomplish.

item.title: Lesson 1
item.description: Lesson 1 Overview Use this page to introduce the focus of Lesson 1 and how it connects to the rest of the course. Summarize what learners should know or be able to do after completing this lesson.

item.title: Lesson 1: Introduction
item.description: Lesson 1 Introduction Give learners context for this lesson: why the topic matters, how it connects to prior knowledge, and what questions they should keep in mind as they move through the content.

item.title: Lesson 1: Content
item.description: Lesson 1 Content Organize the main instructional materials for Lesson 1 here. Combine text, media, and interactive elements to guide learners through concepts, examples, and practice opportunities. nambah <todo> 1

item.title: Lesson 1: Conclusion
item.description: Lesson 1 Conclusion Wrap up Lesson 1 by revisiting the learning objectives, summarizing key takeaways, and pointing learners toward next steps such as reflections, assessments, or the next lesson. What is strawberry in Spanish fresa sadsada Deep thoughts.
